name: Support page offers a WhatsApp contact link with a prefilled message
description: Verifies /destek renders a support entry point with a WhatsApp link that opens wa.me with a prefilled support message (covers the non-AI fallback UI, which is the default when the customer AI chat UI flag is off).

planSteps.description: The page shows a support heading and a link/button whose visible text contains 'WhatsApp'
The WhatsApp link's href starts with 'https://wa.me/' and includes a URL-encoded text query parameter
